schedule.description: DH Sweep Recap: Swanson 11 RBI Franchise Record
Cubs Acquire David Peterson from Mets
Ben Brown to IL — Six Starters Down
Wild Card Race: Half Game Back of Cardinals
Boyd Returns Tonight — First Start Since May 3
Pre-Game Hype: Series Finale, Boyd's Return

stories.title: Doubleheader Sweep + Swanson 11 RBI Franchise Record
stories.angle: Informative/Bold — Cubs swept the Mets 10-3 and 10-5 on June 24; Swanson's 11 RBIs in one doubleheader breaks Ron Santo's 56-year-old Cubs record

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Cubs swept the Mets twice yesterday. 10-3 and 10-5.

Dansby Swanson drove in 11 runs in a doubleheader — a CUBS FRANCHISE RECORD, breaking Ron Santo's 56-year-old mark.

3-run HR. Grand slam. Go-ahead triple. Dansby is LOCKED IN.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Cubs Acquire David Peterson from the Mets
stories.angle: Bold/Analysis — Cubs traded for Peterson from the literal team they were playing, giving up top-13 prospect Cole Mathis; Peterson's 6.09 ERA masks a 3.85 FIP and 51% GB rate; rotation survival move

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The Cubs just traded for David Peterson — from the team they're currently PLAYING.

His 6.09 ERA is ugly. His 3.85 FIP and 51% groundball rate say something different.

Desperate move? Maybe. But five starters are on the IL. Options are limited.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Rotation Crisis — Ben Brown Joins IL, Six Starters Down
stories.angle: Informative/Urgent — Ben Brown (1.85 ERA, Cubs' best rotation option) is now shelved; six total starters sidelined this season; Counsell: "This is crazy"

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Ben Brown just joined the Cubs' IL — neck strain. He was 4-2 with a 1.85 ERA.

Five starters are now shelved: Horton, Steele, Taillon, Cabrera, Brown.

"This is crazy," said Counsell. He wasn't wrong. Boyd returns tonight as the lone bright spot.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Wild Card Race — Half a Game Back of the Cardinals
stories.angle: Informative — Cardinals 42-35, Phillies 43-36, Cubs 43-37; Cubs gained ground with the DH sweep; every game from here is meaningful

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Cardinals: 42-35. Phillies: 43-36. Cubs: 43-37.

Half a game separates Chicago from the Cardinals in the wild card race.

The Cubs swept yesterday's doubleheader to tighten it up. Two months left to decide this thing.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

stories.title: Boyd Returns Tonight — First Start Since May 3
stories.angle: Informative — Boyd activated after meniscus surgery, completed 30-pitch bullpen at Citi Field, Counsell says it's "a big deal"; tonight's series finale his first start in 53 days

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Matthew Boyd starts tonight — first appearance since May 3.

He needed minor knee surgery after a freak injury playing with his kids. Seven weeks later, he's back.

Counsell called it "a big deal." With five starters shelved, he's not wrong.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Pre-Game Hype — Series Finale at 6:10 PM CT
stories.angle: Bold/Hype — Cubs are 6-0 vs. Mets in 2026, shot at 7-0 tonight; Boyd on the mound in his return; wild card implications; Mets 34-48

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Cubs are 6-0 against the Mets this season.

Boyd takes the ball at 6:10 PM CT tonight at Citi Field — coming off seven weeks on the IL.

A win makes it 7-0 vs. New York in 2026 and tightens the wild card race even further.

Let's go.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs
